_comment: Star Wars themed Discord layout for Order 66 clan server. Target server ID: 1471072707524296767. Consumed by discord/setup_server.py or imported into Xenon. Discord channel types: 0=text, 2=voice, 4=category.
_tagline: Destiny voyager optimizer · wishlist organizer · API stat tracking
_naming_convention: Star Wars themed names. Channel topics describe the actual purpose so members don't get lost.

roles.name: Emperor's Royal Guard
roles._purpose: Co-admins / trusted lieutenants — elite tier between Emperor and mods

roles.name: Imperial Trooper
roles._purpose: Clan members — gated access to Imperial Troopers category

roles.name: Unverified
roles._purpose: Default on join — sees only gateway

categories.name: 📋 In a Galaxy Far Far Away
categories._purpose: Gateway / new members — visible to Unverified

channels.name: welcome
channels.topic: Start here. Read the law → pick your roles → introduce yourself.

channels.name: imperial-law
channels.topic: Server rules. Read before chatting. (rules)

channels.name: the-council
channels.topic: Meet the mods + active members.

channels.name: in-a-galaxy-far-far-away
channels.topic: Introductions. Tell us who you are, your platform, your time zone.

channels.name: galactic-standard-time
channels.topic: Find people in your time zone. Pick a TZ role in #recruitment-roles.

channels.name: recruitment-roles
channels.topic: React to messages here to assign yourself roles — clan status, platform, dungeon/raid experience, time zone. (formerly: pick-roles)

categories.name: 📣 Imperial Declarations
categories._setup_note: Set as Discord announcement channel type if available. Restrict 'send messages' to Death Star Command + Emperor only.

channels.name: imperial-declarations
channels.topic: Server announcements, release notes, important pings. Read-only for members.

categories.name: 🎫 Galactic Senate
categories._setup_note: Invite TicketTool.xyz (https://tickettool.xyz/) and run /setup in #bounty-office to enable private tickets.

channels.name: bounty-office
channels.topic: Open a private ticket here for mod help. Powered by TicketTool.xyz.

categories.name: 🚀 The Imperial Armory
categories._purpose: Destiny Voyager app + toolkit support (the Order 66 clan's app)
categories._setup_note: Restrict view to verified roles (Imperial Trooper / Rebel Ally / Padawan).

channels.name: destiny-voyager
channels.topic: 📌 Destiny Voyager — the Order 66 clan app. Latest .exe pinned at top. Download, setup steps, and FAQ here.

channels.name: smugglers-cache
channels.topic: Older releases, DIM CSV templates, manifest backups.

channels.name: engineering-bay
channels.topic: Destiny Voyager support — bug reports, install help, questions.

channels.name: imperial-briefings
channels.topic: Release notes + version pings for Destiny Voyager.

channels.name: senate-polls
channels.topic: Quick 2-day polls on builds, features, meta. (formerly: 2-day-polls)

channels.name: the-cantina
channels.topic: General chat — like the Mos Eisley Cantina.

channels.name: cantina-tables
channels.topic: Find buddies, mentors, fireteam regulars.

categories.name: ⚔️ Imperial Troopers
categories._setup_note: Restrict ALL channels here to @Imperial Trooper role only. This is your clan-private space.

channels.name: trooper-comms
channels.topic: Clan-only chat. (Imperial Trooper role required)

channels.name: clan-events
channels.topic: Clan event scheduling, raid nights, GM runs.

channels.name: trooper-builds
channels.topic: Internal build sharing. Clan-only DIM URLs.

channels.name: mandalorian-warriors
channels.topic: Titan builds — armored Mando-style. Drop DIM share URLs.

channels.name: the-bad-batch
channels.topic: Hunter builds — elite specialists. Drop DIM share URLs.

channels.name: jedi-order
channels.topic: Warlock builds — Force users. Drop DIM share URLs.

channels.name: lfg-storyline
channels.topic: LFG — story missions, campaign coop, exotic missions.

channels.name: lfg-pvp
channels.topic: LFG — Crucible, Trials, Iron Banner, Competitive.

channels.name: trial-of-combat
channels.topic: Set up private matches.

channels.name: lfg-endgame
channels.topic: LFG — GM Nightfalls, Master raids, day-one races.

channels.name: treasure-of-the-sith
channels.topic: Where to farm each exotic. Drop tips + locations.

categories.name: 🏔️ Dagobah Trials
categories._purpose: DUNGEONS only — never mix raid content here. Current Destiny 2 dungeon roster (Edge of Fate / Renegades era, 2025-2026).

channels.name: lfg-dungeons
channels.topic: LFG for any dungeon.

channels.name: equilibrium
channels.topic: Equilibrium dungeon — Edge of Fate (2025). Praxic Blade, Sullen Claw, Heirloom.

channels.name: sundered-doctrine
channels.topic: Sundered Doctrine dungeon — Renegades (2025). Drowning Labyrinth, Finality's Auger.

channels.name: warlords-ruin
channels.topic: Warlord's Ruin dungeon — Season of the Wish (2023). Hefnd's Vengeance, Locus of Wailing Grief.

channels.name: ghosts-of-the-deep
channels.topic: Ghosts of the Deep dungeon — Season of the Deep (2023). Ecthar / Šimumah / final boss.

channels.name: spire-of-the-watcher
channels.topic: Spire of the Watcher dungeon — Season of the Seraph (2022). Akelous / Persys.

channels.name: duality
channels.topic: Duality dungeon — Season of the Haunted (2022). Gahlran / Caiatl / Egregore.

channels.name: grasp-of-avarice
channels.topic: Grasp of Avarice dungeon — 30th Anniversary (2021). Gjallarhorn quest, Captain Avarokk.

channels.name: prophecy
channels.topic: Prophecy dungeon — D2 Y3 (returned post-vault). Kell Echo / Phalanx Echo.

channels.name: pit-of-heresy
channels.topic: Pit of Heresy dungeon — Shadowkeep (2019, returned). Hive shrines, Zulmak.

channels.name: shattered-throne
channels.topic: Shattered Throne dungeon — Forsaken (2018, returned). Vorgeth, Dûl Incaru.

channels.name: padawan-training
channels.topic: Patient teachers + sherpas for newer players.

categories.name: ⚔️ The Death Star Awaits
categories._purpose: RAIDS only — never mix dungeon content here. Current Destiny 2 raid roster (Edge of Fate / Renegades era, 2025-2026).
categories._excluded: Leviathan + Spire of Stars + Eater of Worlds (sunset), Scourge of the Past (sunset), Crown of Sorrow (sunset)

channels.name: lfg-raids
channels.topic: LFG for any raid.

channels.name: desert-perpetual
channels.topic: Desert Perpetual raid — Edge of Fate (2025).

channels.name: salvations-edge
channels.topic: Salvation's Edge raid — Final Shape (2024).

channels.name: root-of-nightmares
channels.topic: Root of Nightmares raid — Lightfall (2023).

channels.name: vow-of-the-disciple
channels.topic: Vow of the Disciple raid — Witch Queen (2022).

channels.name: deep-stone-crypt
channels.topic: Deep Stone Crypt raid — Beyond Light (2020).

channels.name: garden-of-salvation
channels.topic: Garden of Salvation raid — Shadowkeep (2019), currently in rotation.

channels.name: last-wish
channels.topic: Last Wish raid — Forsaken (2018, never sunset).

channels.name: kings-fall
channels.topic: King's Fall raid — D1 rerelease (2022).

channels.name: vault-of-glass
channels.topic: Vault of Glass raid — D1 rerelease (2021).

channels.name: crotas-end
channels.topic: Crota's End raid — D1 rerelease (2023).

channels.name: jedi-training
channels.topic: Patient teachers + sherpas for first-clears.

channels.name: galactic-stats
channels.topic: Charlemagne / Raid Report links + personal stat dumps.

channels.name: weekly-briefing
channels.topic: Weekly reset summary: Nightfall, Trials map, vendor rotations.

channels.name: fashion-show
channels.topic: Fashion shots. Glow-up your guardian.

channels.name: galactic-ball
channels.topic: Weekly fashion contest entries.

channels.name: force-wisdom
channels.topic: Quotes, life advice, lore drops.

channels.name: cantina-photos
channels.topic: IRL pics if you want.

channels.name: jedi-trials
channels.topic: Title farms — Conqueror, Flawless, Rivensbane, etc.

channels.name: broken-comms
channels.topic: Text channel for voice users with broken mics.

channels.name: 💤 Carbonite Chamber
channels._setup_note: Set this as the server AFK channel under Server Settings → Overview → Inactive Channel.

categories.name: 📡 Destiny 2 Resources
categories._purpose: Vendor + weekly-info reference channels (Kyber-style). One channel per topic so members can mute the noise they don't care about.

channels.name: weekly-reset
channels.topic: Tuesday reset summary — Nightfall, Trials map, vendor rotations, story missions.

channels.name: twid
channels.topic: This Week in Destiny — Bungie's weekly blog post + key takeaways.

channels.name: xur
channels.topic: Xûr's Friday-Tuesday location + inventory. Auto-posted by bot when location is known.

channels.name: ada-1
channels.topic: Ada-1's daily armor mod offerings + her bounties.

channels.name: rahool-rank-up-info
channels.topic: Rahool focusing options + cipher inventory + rank-up rewards.

channels.name: gunsmith
channels.topic: Banshee-44's daily weapon rotation + Gunsmith rank-ups.

channels.name: armor-3point0
channels.topic: Armor 3.0 system reference — stat tiers, mod costs, armor archetypes (Bulwark / Brawler / Grenadier / Paragon / Specialist / Gunner).

channels.name: foundry-hakke
channels.topic: Hakke Foundry weapons + perks.

channels.name: foundry-suros
channels.topic: SUROS Foundry weapons + perks.

channels.name: foundry-tex-mechanica
channels.topic: Tex Mechanica Foundry weapons + perks.

channels.name: foundry-omolon
channels.topic: Omolon Foundry weapons + perks.

channels.name: foundry-veist
channels.topic: VEIST Foundry weapons + perks.

channels.name: court-projects
channels.topic: Eliksni Project / Court of Blades / faction-grind activities + rewards.

channels.name: eververse
channels.topic: Eververse cosmetics rotation + Bright Dust costs.

channels.name: lost-sectors
channels.topic: Daily Legend + Master Lost Sector + exotic-armor drop pool.

channels.name: planet-specific
channels.topic: Per-destination loot pools, exotic missions, secret chests, region chests.

channels.name: seasonal-content
channels.topic: Current expansion / episode content — quests, exotics, story missions.

channels.name: the-sieve
channels.topic: Edge of Fate's 'The Sieve' rotating exotic mission — current rotation + best farm route.

channels.name: vex-incursion
channels.topic: Neomuna Vex Incursion zone — exotic rewards, schedule, key drops.

channels.name: trials-and-iron-banner
channels.topic: Trials of Osiris (Fri-Tue) + Iron Banner (monthly) — current map, mode, adept weapon, armor focusing.

categories.name: 💀 Death Star Command
categories._purpose: Mods / staff only — replaces old 'Mod Only' category
categories._setup_note: Restrict view to @Death Star Command + @Emperor roles only.

channels.name: imperial-records
channels.topic: FlaviBot / MEE6 mod actions logged here.

channels.name: council-chambers
channels.topic: Admin-only chat.
